Pathways synchronizing multicellular coordination involved in Crohn’s disease progression

Qi Liu

24 February, 2026

  • Load the library, the seurat object, and the ligand-target matrix
  • Generate pseudo-bulk expression profiles for each cell type
  • Run mcCoordPath to perform pathway-guided matrix factorization
  • Results visulization
    • Pathways involved in each latent factor in each cell type
    • Latent Factors
    • Variance Explained by each factor in each cell type
    • Top genes contributing to LF17 and LF20
    • Top genes contributing to LF17 and involved in TNFa signaling
    • Ligand-receptor interactions contributing to LF17
    • Ligand-receptor interactions contributing to LF20

Load the library, the seurat object, and the ligand-target matrix

library(mcCoordPath)
library(Seurat)



cd_obj<-readRDS(url("https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/v0ss7n69gxw2b45rdtifv/CD_TI.rds?rlkey=v6lsk6dmtpknxwff74b4cnl5n&dl=1"))

ligand_target_matrix<-readRDS(url("https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/ryr2ax35sjxayms6whyh6/ligand_target_matrix.rds?rlkey=hhj2nx6s9dxpl5mzrukkbquoq&dl=1"))

Generate pseudo-bulk expression profiles for each cell type

## include four cell types: Epithelial, T, Macrophage, and Goblet
epi<-cd_obj[,grep("StemM|Cycling|Enterocyte|LND",cd_obj$anno)]
t<-cd_obj[,grep("^T$",cd_obj$anno)]
macro<-cd_obj[,grep("Macro",cd_obj$anno)]
goblet<-cd_obj[,grep("Gob",cd_obj$anno)]

explist<-lapply(list(epi,goblet,t,macro),function(x){ exp<-as.matrix(log2(AverageExpression(x,group.by="PatientID")$RNA+1));exp<-t(scale(t(exp),center=T,scale=F))})

group<- apply(table(cd_obj$histo,cd_obj$PatientID),2,function(x){which(x>0)}) 

#find common samples
common_cols <- Reduce(intersect, lapply(explist[c(1:4)], colnames))
explist_common <- lapply(explist, function(mat) mat[, common_cols, drop = FALSE])
group_com<-group[names(group) %in% common_cols]
group_com <- factor(group_com, 
                    levels = c(1, 2, 3),  
                    labels = c("active", "inactive", "control"))  

# Reorder factor levels
group_com <- factor(group_com, levels = c("control", "inactive", "active"))

Run mcCoordPath to perform pathway-guided matrix factorization

result<-mcCoordPath(explist_common,pathway)

Results visulization

library(pheatmap)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(dplyr)
library(igraph)
library(ggraph)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyverse)


view_names=c("Epi","Gob","T","Macro")


cat("### Pathways involved in each latent factor in each cell type\n")

Pathways involved in each latent factor in each cell type

plot_multicellular_pathways(result,view_names=view_names)

cat("### Latent Factors\n")

Latent Factors

plot_all_LFs(result,sample_group=group_com,ncol=6,add_violin =T)

Variance Explained by each factor in each cell type

plot_variance_explained(explist_common,result,view_names=view_names)

Top genes contributing to LF17 and LF20

plot_top_genes_LF(result,lf_index = 17,view_names=view_names)

plot_top_genes_LF(result,lf_index = 20,view_names=view_names)

Top genes contributing to LF17 and involved in TNFa signaling

plot_top_genes_LF_in_a_pathway(result,lf_index = 17,view_names=view_names,pathMat = pathway,pathName = "TNF")

Ligand-receptor interactions contributing to LF17

result_int<-infer_lr_interactions(result,lf_index = 17,lr_df=LRpair,ligand_target_matrix=ligand_target_matrix,view_names = view_names)
plot_lr_interactions(result_int)

Ligand-receptor interactions contributing to LF20

result_int<-infer_lr_interactions(result,lf_index = 20,lr_df=LRpair,ligand_target_matrix=ligand_target_matrix,view_names = view_names)
plot_lr_interactions(result_int)
